quotes.0.text: Every image tells a story. Make yours unforgettable.
quotes.1.author: Henri Matisse
quotes.2.author: Alina Wheeler
quotes.3.author: Hans Christian Andersen
quotes.4.text: Vision is the art of seeing what is invisible to others.
quotes.4.author: Jonathan Swift
quotes.5.text: A photograph is a secret about a secret.
quotes.5.author: Diane Arbus
quotes.6.text: Art is not what you see, but what you make others see.
quotes.6.author: Edgar Degas
quotes.7.author: George Eastman
quotes.8.text: To me, photography is an art of observation.
quotes.8.author: Elliott Erwitt
quotes.9.text: The best stories are lived before they are told.
quotes.10.text: Create with the heart; build with the mind.
quotes.10.author: Criss Jami
quotes.11.text: In photography there is a reality so subtle that it becomes more real than reality.
quotes.11.author: Alfred Stieglitz
workflow.0.title: Upload Your Photos
workflow.0.description: Drag and drop your best shots. Support for JPEG, PNG, WebP and HEIC up to 10 images.
workflow.1.title: Style with Vintage Cameras
workflow.1.description: Choose from 10 iconic camera profiles and 9 retro film filters. KodaPost's AI writes your captions.
workflow.2.title: Publish Everywhere
workflow.2.description: Export for Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, Reddit, and X. One click, every platform.
features.0.title: Vintage Camera Profiles
features.0.description: Sony Mavica, Polaroid 600, Kodak EasyShare and 7 more iconic cameras recreated in code.
features.1.title: Caption Writing Assistant
features.1.description: Tell your story and KodaPost can help draft captions and headlines that match your story.
features.2.title: Retro Film Filters
features.2.description: 1977, Earlybird, Lo-Fi, Nashville and more. Every pixel processed to feel like it came from film.
features.3.title: Audio Clips
features.3.description: Browse and add royalty-free music clips with allowable licensing for use in your phonographic carousels.
features.4.title: Nano-Casts
features.4.description: Turn your phonographic carousel into a short-form audio story. Record a voiceover or let KodaPost generate one for you.
features.5.title: Customizable Templates
features.5.description: Start from beautifully designed carousel templates or build your own. Every element is fully customizable.
features.6.title: Creator Provenance
features.6.description: Every export embeds your name, timestamp, and a unique image fingerprint into the file metadata. Add a visible watermark for instant attribution. Prove you made it first.
features.7.title: Content Calendar
features.7.description: Schedule your phonographic carousels, track your creative output, and stay consistent without the burnout.
segments.0.label: Content Creators
segments.0.headline: Turn your photo library into a content engine.
segments.0.description: You already have the eye. KodaPost handles the production work so you can post consistently without burning out.
segments.0.points.0.title: Batch-Create a Week of Posts
segments.0.points.0.text: Upload once, get a full week of styled, captioned phonographic carousels ready to publish.
segments.0.points.1.title: AI Captions in Your Voice
segments.0.points.1.text: KodaPost writes scroll-stopping copy you edit and approve. Your voice, amplified.
segments.0.points.2.title: Publish Everywhere at Once
segments.0.points.2.text: Export optimized for Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, Reddit, and X.
segments.0.points.3.title: Content Calendar
segments.0.points.3.text: Schedule carousels, track output, and stay consistent without the burnout.
segments.1.label: Indie Brands
segments.1.headline: Your brand voice, amplified across every platform.
segments.1.description: KodaPost gives your small team the same polished, consistent content output as brands ten times your size, without losing the authenticity that makes you different.
segments.1.points.0.title: Locked-In Brand Aesthetic
segments.1.points.0.text: Set your camera profile, film filter, fonts, and colors once. Every carousel matches automatically.
segments.1.points.1.title: Multi-Platform, No Reformatting
segments.1.points.1.text: One export covers every social channel with the right dimensions and aspect ratio.
segments.1.points.2.title: Creator Provenance
segments.1.points.2.text: Every export embeds your brand, timestamp, and a unique fingerprint. Prove you made it first.
segments.1.points.3.title: Stand Out from Canva Templates
segments.1.points.3.text: Vintage camera profiles and retro filters give your brand a visual differentiator competitors can't copy.
segments.2.label: Artists
segments.2.headline: Your art deserves better than stock templates.
segments.2.description: KodaPost's vintage aesthetic and human-in-the-loop approach means your portfolio carousels feel as intentional as the work itself.
segments.2.points.0.title: 10 Vintage Camera Profiles
segments.2.points.0.text: Sony Mavica, Polaroid 600, Kodak EasyShare and more. Your work, through an iconic lens.
segments.2.points.1.title: Retro Film Filters
segments.2.points.1.text: 1977, Earlybird, Lo-Fi, Nashville. Every pixel processed to feel like it came from film.
segments.2.points.2.title: Nano-Casts
segments.2.points.2.text: Turn your carousel into a short-form audio story. Add a voiceover to walk viewers through your process.
segments.2.points.3.title: You Stay in Control
segments.2.points.3.text: Every caption, crop, and filter is a suggestion you accept, modify, or reject. The assistant, never the artist.
hero.description: KodaPost is the phonographic carousel creator for indie brands and content creators. Transform your photos into nostalgic, scroll-stopping phonographic carousels with vintage camera styles, retro film filters, with a just a little help from AI.
howItWorks.title: Easily Create
featuresSection.title: KodaPost Features
featuresSection.subtitle: Everything indie creators need to turn everyday photos into scroll-stopping phonographic carousels, no design experience required.
whoItsFor.title: Built for People Who
whoItsFor.subtitle: Whether you're growing an audience, launching a brand, or sharing your art, KodaPost fits your workflow.
provenance.title: Your Work Is Yours.
provenance.subtitle: Social media is flooded with AI-generated slop and wholesale copies of original work. KodaPost doesn't just help you create. It helps you prove you created it first.
provenance.mainCard.title: Digital Fingerprint on Every Export
provenance.mainCard.description: Every phonographic carousel you export from KodaPost embeds your name, a timestamp, and a unique image fingerprint directly into the file metadata. If someone copies your work, you have the receipt.
provenance.mainCard.imageAlt: Creator provenance metadata embedded in exported image
provenance.cards.0.title: Protect Your Art from AI Scraping
provenance.cards.0.text: Your original photos and designs are your IP. Creator Provenance creates a verifiable chain of authorship that stands up when your content gets reposted, scraped, or fed into AI training sets.
provenance.cards.1.title: Visible Watermarking
provenance.cards.1.text: Add a branded watermark to your carousels so attribution is instant and visible. Your audience knows it's yours before they even read the caption.
provenance.cards.2.title: Own Your Creative Identity
provenance.cards.2.text: In an era where AI-generated content is indistinguishable from human work, provenance is your proof of authenticity. KodaPost empowers creators, artists, and brands to claim what's theirs.
provenance.learnMore: Learn How Proof of Real Works
mobile.title: Create Phonographic Carousels from Your Phone with
mobile.description: Snap photos on your phone and send them straight to your KodaPost content assistant via Telegram. KodaPost receives your images, applies your preferred style, and queues a carousel draft, all while you're still on the go. No app downloads, no switching between tools. Just open Telegram, send your photos, and pick up where you left off on the KodaPost desktop app when you're ready to finalize.
telegram.steps.3: Review and publish on KodaPost desktop
telegram.description: Open Telegram and search for @kodacontentbot. Tap Start, send 1 to 10 photos, describe what the post is about, and choose a vibe. The bot generates your caption and builds the carousel for you. Use the preview link to review slides, copy captions, and download images right from your phone.
mobileWeb.installDescription: Add KodaPost to your home screen for instant, full-screen access. No app store needed. KodaPost works as a Progressive Web App, so it launches in its own window, works offline, and feels just like a native app.
mobileWeb.iphone.label: iPhone:
mobileWeb.iphone.instructions: Open KodaPost in Safari, tap Share, then Add to Home Screen
mobileWeb.android.label: Android:
mobileWeb.android.instructions: Open KodaPost in Chrome, tap Menu, then Add to Home screen
mobileWeb.description: Once installed, KodaPost opens full-screen from your home screen with no browser bar. You can upload photos, apply filters, edit text overlays, and even publish directly from your phone. Your projects sync automatically, so you can start on mobile and finish on desktop.
cta.title: Start Creating Phonographic Carousels with KodaPost, Free
cta.subtitle: Join indie creators using KodaPost to build authentic, nostalgic social media content that stands out from the algorithm.
footer.description: KodaPost transforms your everyday photos into stunning nostalgic phonographic carousels with 10 vintage camera profiles, 9 retro film filters, and AI-powered text overlays. The content creation tool designed for indie brands who value authenticity over algorithms.
footer.product.heading: Product
footer.legal.heading: Legal
footer.tagline: Built for creators who refuse to compromise.
